violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Imitation crab meat was observed thawed in the 1-door reach-in unit in its intact original reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood packaged in ROP shall be removed completely from its original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food item was observed at 38 degrees Fahrenheit and was removed from its packaging during the time of inspection. Proper thawing methods reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

Food contact surfaces of dough mixer, slicer, hook attachments, buffalo chopper, and dough sheeter were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were actively placed to be cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

All ingredients were observed between 48-51 degrees Fahrenheit in pizza prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Time/ temperature abused foods were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. See disposal list. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -shelving in walk-in cooler -shelving and counter tops near pizza oven -interior and exterior of refrigeration units -cardboard lined shelves (this material is not easily cleanable). -ice accumulation in chest freezers New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
3 bay sink observed leaking when in use. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The ceiling tiles in the front prep station are constructed of composite acoustic tiles which is not durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The ceiling tiles by vents have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The person in charge was not knowledgeable of sanitizing dishes in the 3 bay sink. The person in charge must demonstrate to the health department knowledge of foodborne disease prevention, application of HACCP principles, and the requirements of this Code. 3 bay sink was set up during time of inspection. Warewashing and 3 Bay sink poster provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (buffalo chopper) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was taken to 3 bay sink to be washed rinse and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Shredded cheese was observed held at (49) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS foods were removed from 3 door lowboy and placed into other refrigeration during time of inspection. Unit was taken out of service to hold potentially hazardous foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Parcooked chicken was observed cooling in the walk-in cooler. Establishment is not permitted to parcook raw animal proteins without prior variance approval of parcooking from RIDOH CFP. Establishment instructed to cease process. Food was fully cooked during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the 3 door refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. shelving in walk-in cooler 2. exterior of pizza oven 3. shelves in prep area 4. interior of lowboy refrigeration units New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
Hot water was observed with a continuous leak at 3 bay sink faucet. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
Several ceiling tiles were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The ceiling tiles in the front prep station are constructed of composite acoustic tiles which are not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for ceilings must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris:1. floors, walls and ceiling in walk-in cooler2. fanguards in walk-in cooler3. ceiling tiles by vents4. walls behind grill The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
